brand.name: Kumbh Connect
brand.tagline: One Trusted Digital Partner for Kumbh Visitors

home.heroTitle: Your trusted digital partner for the Kumbh
home.heroSubtitle: Book stays and rides, order sattvic food, find your route, and get emergency help — with real people on WhatsApp at every step.
home.servicesTitle: Everything you need, in one place

trust.verifiedDesc: Every stay, tent and cab is KYC-checked.
trust.secureDesc: Pay a small advance; balance on arrival.
trust.liveDesc: Real support on WhatsApp, every step.
trust.experienceDesc: Built by people who served the last Kumbh.

how.step1Desc: Pick a service and share dates, party size and area — on the site or WhatsApp.
how.step2Desc: We show verified vendors with clear, all-in pricing.
how.step3Desc: Pay a small advance, get a WhatsApp voucher, and reach a human anytime.

home.ctaTitle: Ready to plan a peaceful Kumbh?
home.ctaSubtitle: Start a chat now — our team replies fast in English, हिंदी and मराठी.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Pick what you need. Everything is verified, priced clearly, and backed by live help.

rooms.name: Room booking
rooms.short: Hotels, lodges & homestays near the ghats.
rooms.long: Comfortable, verified stays close to the snan ghats and Trimbakeshwar temple — for couples, families and elderly travellers.

tents.name: Tent booking
tents.long: Stay close to the action in managed tent cities — from basic dormitory tents to private deluxe tents with attached facilities.

cabs.name: Cab & auto booking
cabs.long: Reliable cabs and autos for airport/station pickups, ghat drops and outer-parking shuttles — with fixed, fair fares.

food.name: Food delivery
food.long: Hygienic sattvic thalis, regional meals and prasad packs delivered to your stay or pickup point.

routes.name: Route guidance
routes.long: Live routing for snan days — ghat maps, road closures, e-shuttle points and the safest way to reach the river.

emergency.name: Emergency help
emergency.long: One tap to the nearest medical, police or lost-and-found desk — with your location shared automatically and a human on the line.

parking.name: Parking information
parking.long: Real-time outer-parking availability and shuttle timings, so you park once and ride in stress-free.

guide.title: Nashik Kumbh 2027 — complete visitor guide
guide.subtitle: Snan dates, ghat maps, packing list, transport, do's & don'ts and safety — everything you need for a peaceful pilgrimage.
guide.snanNote: Dates are indicative and will be confirmed by the administration. We update this page as official dates are announced.

book.title: Book a service
book.subtitle: A few quick details and we'll line up verified options. You can finish on WhatsApp anytime.
book.name: Your name
book.leadSaved: Got it! We've saved your request.
book.leadSavedDesc: Tap below to continue on WhatsApp — our team will share vetted options shortly.
book.advanceNote: Pay a small advance to lock your booking. Balance is due on arrival.
book.paymentStubbed: Payments are in test mode. In production this opens secure Razorpay/UPI checkout.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.phone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.

vendors.title: Partner with Kumbh Connect
vendors.subtitle: Reach lakhs of pilgrims. We bring you verified bookings; you focus on great service.

value.demandDesc: We channel high-intent pilgrims straight to your inventory.
value.paymentsDesc: Transparent commissions and weekly settlement records.
value.supportDesc: Our WhatsApp team handles first-line customer questions.

vendors.kycNote: After signup, our team verifies your KYC documents before you go live.
vendors.submitted: Thanks! Our partnerships team will reach out within 48 hours.

emergency.title: Emergency help
emergency.subtitle: Pick what you need. We'll share your location and connect you to the nearest desk and a live agent.
emergency.locationError: Couldn't get your location. You can still call directly.
emergency.disclaimer: In a life-threatening emergency, call 112 immediately.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Live operations — leads, vendors, support and revenue at a glance.
admin.loadError: Couldn't load the dashboard. Check the API and try again.
admin.persistNote: Saved locally to .data/store.json — data persists across restarts. Connect Supabase for production.
admin.adminsHint: People who can sign in to this dashboard.
admin.actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
admin.noLeads: No leads yet. They'll appear here as visitors submit the booking form.

footer.tagline: Helping pilgrims experience the Kumbh with calm and confidence.

consent.message: We use cookies for analytics to improve your experience. You choose.
